flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Maria College of Albany fell 67% between 2021 and 2024 (100.0% → 33.3%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Maria College of Albany fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (42.9% → 28.6%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Maria College of Albany fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (38.9% → 30.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Maria College of Albany rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.0k → $9.3k).
